title: Cronos Group Inc (CRON) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Cronos achieved consolidated net revenue of $27.8 million, representing a 46% year-over-year increase. In constant currency terms, revenue climbed 49% to $28.3 million, driven by stronger cannabis flower and extract sales across Canadian and international markets. The company reported gross profit of $6.3 million with a 23% margin—a significant improvement of approximately 600 basis points. However, consolidated adjusted EBITDA remained negative at $11.1 million, though this showed $4.9 million of improvement from the prior year. Cronos maintained a robust balance sheet with cash and cash equivalents of $848 million. Operating performance improved markedly, with positive cash flow from operations of $1.7 million versus negative $11.8 million previously and positive free cash flow of $8 million. The Spinach brand demonstrated strong market traction, capturing 6.2% share in the flower category, 15.6% in edibles, and 6.8% in the vape segment. GrowCo contributed approximately $2.7 million in third-party revenue during Q2.
